ObservableEventStreamResponse Properties

One Identity Manager API Server

The ObservableEventStreamResponse type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
AwaitTasks
Gets or sets a flag indicating if the system will await any outstanding write operations to the target. This can cause deadlocks.
